description: You are a forensic analyst processing a seized USB drive for a lead detective who needs to review the relevant files on their standard laptop. Create a forensic case in Autopsy named 'Evidence_Handover_2024' (case number 'INV-PC-001') using the disk image at '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd'. Identify and tag at least 10 JPEG images with a custom tag named 'Investigator_Review'. Generate an Autopsy Portable Case containing only the items with the 'Investigator_Review' tag. Create a handover memo at '/home/ga/Reports/handover_memo.txt' containing the following lines: 'CASE_NAME: Evidence_Handover_2024', 'TAG_APPLIED: Investigator_Review', 'TAGGED_COUNT: <number of files you tagged>', and 'PORTABLE_CASE_DIR: <full absolute path to the generated portable case folder>'.
